channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping on Thanet Road, 27th June
item.description:
A cat house/tower has been left on the pavement by the alleyway next to the doctors surgery. I am sure I saw this same item on a driveway on Thursday however this morning it has moved onto the pavement further down the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Thanet Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 27th June
item.description:
Decomposing dead fox in the graveyard position shown on the map by the water tap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Hill, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed dumped again, 27th June
item.description:
Bed dumped on the side alley again!!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins again, 27th June
item.description:
Please can our bins be emptied as soon as possible as they are overflowing again. Any chance of another bin? Or much larger bins? Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Behind electrical sub station, 27th June
item.description:
Fly tip behind electrical sub station again. It's ongoing issue for years now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Camelot Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of areas devoid of grass - can it be re seeded?, 27th June
item.description:
Hi. Due to the significant increase in visitors to our park, our lawn is starting to look a little rough and bald in quite a few places. Please can the lawn have new grass seeds at some point. Many thanks in advance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green waste and black bags, 27th June
item.description:
Nearest 1 Nimegen Way SE22 8TL

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Nimegen Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ugly old lights need removing, 27th June
item.description:
Please can these ugly old lights be removed from the park. They haven’t been used for years and are unsightly in our shrub bed. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large dead tree on top/edge of The Ha-Ha Wall, 27th June
item.description:
Hi. We are concerned about this very large tree that is on the edge of The Ha-Ha Wall in Bromley Palace Park. It appears to be dead, we’re worried that it might fall on people who are either walking along The Ha-Ha path or exploring the park. Please can you investigate and make it safe. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Security fencing needs re fixing, 27th June
item.description:
Hi. Our youths have unbolted another section of the security fencing. Please can this be re secured. The other part of the security fencing is still waiting to be re secured. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 27th June
item.description:
Fly tipping on corner of Sondes Road/Portland Street, SE17. Clearly states where it comes from.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sondes Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Topiary bushes all need trimming/shaping, 27th June
item.description:
Please can all these topiary bushes be trimmed and made tidy again. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suitcase abandoned, 27th June
item.description:
Suitcase abandoned near electrical telephone box

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kirkham Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa fly tipped, 27th June
item.description:
Grey sofa left in road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kirkham Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Security fencing needs repairing - side of The Ice House, 27th June
item.description:
Please can the security fencing be repaired at the side of the ice house. They have bent it forward in order to climb onto the fragile roof of The Ice House. It looks like the top part is damaged. Hopefully you can bend it back and re secure the top brackets.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping wooden pallets, 27th June
item.description:
By the side of the working mans club and block of flats across toad from Chinese takeaway 2 wooded pallets

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kirkham Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ceiling needs painting white, 27th June
item.description:
Thank you for repairing the ceiling. Please can the wood be painted white so that it blends in with the rest of the ceiling. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, 27th June
item.description:
This mattress has been sitting at the top of 0bannocburn Road for at least 2 weeks. Please remove asap.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please send someone to clear vomit outside the building, 27th June
item.description:
There is a pile of vomit on the street outside 93 Paul St EC2A 4NY
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paul Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti still visible, 27th June
item.description:
Please can we have a few more coats of paint to hide the graffiti on the ceiling of The Ice House. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
